Control Description: Limit information system access to authorized users, processes acting on behalf of authorized users, and devices
AZ-104 Skill: Manage Microsoft Entra users and groups; Manage RBAC
Azure Service(s): Microsoft Entra ID, Azure RBAC, Conditional Access
Implementation Notes: Create unique user accounts; assign least-privilege RBAC roles; require compliant devices via Conditional Access

Control Description: Limit information system access to the types of transactions and functions that authorized users are permitted to execute
Implementation Notes: Scope RBAC roles to specific functions; use deny policies in Azure Policy; use PIM for JIT privileged access

Control Description: Identify information system users, processes acting on behalf of users, and devices
AZ-104 Skill: Manage Microsoft Entra users and groups; Manage service principals and managed identities
Implementation Notes: Ensure all users have unique identities; use managed identities for service-to-service; register devices in Entra ID

Control Description: Authenticate (or verify) the identities of those users, processes, or devices, as a prerequisite to allowing access
AZ-104 Skill: Manage authentication and authorization; Configure MFA
Azure Service(s): Microsoft Entra MFA, Conditional Access, Azure Key Vault
Implementation Notes: Enable MFA for all users; use managed identities for services; store secrets in Key Vault; monitor authentication failures

Control Description: Sanitize or destroy information system media containing Federal Contract Information before disposal or reuse
AZ-104 Skill: Configure Azure Storage security; Configure Azure Disk Encryption
Azure Service(s): Azure Disk Encryption, Azure Storage SSE, Microsoft Purview
Implementation Notes: [Partial] Azure manages physical media disposal per NIST 800-88; enable ADE on all VMs; use CMK for encryption

Control Description: Limit physical access to organizational information systems, equipment, and operating environments to authorized individuals
AZ-104 Skill: Configure Azure Bastion; Secure access to virtual networks
Azure Service(s): Azure Bastion, Microsoft Entra ID, Microsoft Intune
Implementation Notes: [Partial] Microsoft manages Azure DC physical access; use Azure Bastion to eliminate public RDP/SSH; enforce device compliance

Control Description: Escort visitors and monitor visitor activity
AZ-104 Skill: Monitor resources using Azure Monitor; Configure audit logging
Azure Service(s): Azure Monitor, Microsoft Entra Audit Logs, Microsoft Sentinel
Implementation Notes: [Partial] Microsoft manages DC visitor escorting; enable Entra ID audit logs for guest/B2B user activity tracking

Control Description: Maintain audit logs of physical access
AZ-104 Skill: Configure Azure Monitor Logs; Create and configure Log Analytics workspaces
Azure Service(s): Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, Entra ID Sign-in Logs
Implementation Notes: [Partial] Microsoft maintains DC physical access logs; enable Activity Logs and send to Log Analytics; retain 365 days

Control Description: Control and manage physical access devices
AZ-104 Skill: Manage Microsoft Entra device settings; Manage device registrations
Implementation Notes: [Partial] Microsoft manages DC access devices; use Entra ID device registration and Intune; revoke devices on employee departure

Control Description: Monitor, control, and protect organizational communications at the external boundaries and key internal boundaries
AZ-104 Skill: Configure NSGs; Configure Azure Firewall; Configure virtual network peering
Azure Service(s): Azure Firewall, NSG, Azure DDoS Protection, Application Gateway WAF
Implementation Notes: Create VNets with segmented subnets; apply NSGs with deny-all defaults; deploy Azure Firewall for centralized control; enable DDoS Protection

Control Description: Implement subnetworks for publicly accessible system components that are physically or logically separated from internal networks
AZ-104 Skill: Configure virtual networks; Configure private access to Azure services; Configure private endpoints
Azure Service(s): Azure VNet (DMZ), Application Gateway, Private Endpoints
Implementation Notes: Create DMZ subnet for internet-facing resources; disable public IPs on backend VMs; use Private Endpoints for PaaS; route public traffic through App Gateway WAF

Control Description: Identify, report, and correct information and information system flaws in a timely manner
AZ-104 Skill: Monitor and manage Azure resources; Implement Azure Update Manager
Azure Service(s): Defender for Cloud, Azure Update Manager, Azure Monitor
Implementation Notes: Enable Defender for Cloud (free CSPM); use Update Manager for patch scheduling; review Secure Score recommendations

Control Description: Provide protection from malicious code at appropriate locations within organizational information systems
AZ-104 Skill: Configure Microsoft Defender for Cloud; Monitor security posture
Azure Service(s): Defender for Servers, Microsoft Antimalware, Defender for Storage
Implementation Notes: Deploy Microsoft Antimalware extension on VMs; enable Defender for Servers; enable Defender for Storage

Control Description: Update malicious code protection mechanisms when new releases are available
AZ-104 Skill: Implement Azure Update Manager; Monitor security configurations
Azure Service(s): Microsoft Antimalware (auto-update), Defender for Endpoint, Azure Policy
Implementation Notes: Microsoft Antimalware auto-updates by default; apply Azure Policy to enforce antimalware deployment; monitor update compliance in Defender for Cloud

Control Description: Perform periodic scans of the information system and real-time scans of files from external sources
AZ-104 Skill: Monitor security posture with Defender for Cloud
Azure Service(s): Microsoft Antimalware, Defender for Endpoint, Defender for Storage
Implementation Notes: Configure scheduled scan settings in antimalware extension; enable real-time protection; enable Defender for Storage malware scanning on blob uploads
